title: Between Today and Tomorrow
overview: This intimate documentary follows world-renowned ballet dancer Shuto Yasuyuki and takes you behind the creative process of his groundbreaking approach to the traditions of ballet that has left many moved to tears. Featured in the film is also a rare look at a brand new piece of ballet music, written by Shiina Ringo and choreographed by Megumi Nakamura.
